title: versioning — field classification
description: All versioning fields are public or internal — versioning is a platform-transparent concern. No PII, no PCI, no PHI. Version catalog IS PUBLIC information (docs.academorix.com surfaces it). Audit rows capture the actor for lifecycle transitions but no restricted material.

audit_log: audits.versioning.* rows produced on state transitions (release/deprecate/sunset) + notice publish + version metadata edits. Retained per foundation's audit_log tier rule.

notes: ApiVersion.created_by / updated_by / deleted_by are UUID FKs to users.id — they're `internal` tier by association with the user row, not `confidential`. The user's own identity is confidential; the fact that user X made lifecycle transition Y is internal audit data.
DeprecationNotice.notify_customers + notified_at are `internal` because they're operational orchestration state, not customer-facing content.
